quoteLast: the _Invincible_, which had already been hit more than once by heavy shell without appreciable damage, was struck in “Q” turret.
title: The Grand Fleet, 1914-1916
author: Jellicoe, John Rushworth, 1859-1935

title: Punch, or the London Charivari, Volume 93, October 15th 1887
author: Various; Burnand, F. C. (Francis Cowley), 1836-1917 [Editor]
